title: Implement collapsed column UI enhancements
description:
Enhance the collapsed column rendering with:
- Improved narrow column styling (~48px wide)
- Better rotated label appearance
- Expand icon/button
- Smooth animation between collapsed and expanded states  
- Persist user-toggled collapse state in localStorage (separate from config default)

The basic collapsed rendering is implemented as a placeholder. This issue is for the full polished UI.
creator: ryan.porter
